Notice Of Defendant Enrique Malvars Motion For Mandatory Dismissal Under Ccp 583.210
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Bradley J. Jameson of Philips Spallas & Angstadt LLP, Tel. No. 1-707-252-1505
appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. Mark Punzalan of Chan and Punzalan, Tel. No. 1-415-839-0063 Specially appearing
for Defendant Malvar.


RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Enrique Malvar's motion for mandatory dismissal per CCP 583.210 is denied. By making a general appearance prior to filing this motion for mandatory dismissal, Mr. Malvar waived his right to seek dismissal on the ground that service of the summons and complaint on him as stated in the proof of service timely filed by plaintiff Golden State Broadcasting LLC was invalid. (See word-minutes for details). Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

Malvar.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant Enrique Malvar's motion for mandatory dismissal under CCP 583.210 is continued to July 25, 2018. On or before July 6, 2018, Plaintiff to file Supplemental Opposition Brief on the limited issue of the failure to file a Motion to quash precludes the relief that is sought by this motion. Supplemental Reply Brief to be filed by Defendant on July 20, 2018. Courtesy copies to be delivered to Dept. 302. Trial date on this matter is continued to July 30, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 206. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
